subject: Databases
title: Choosing the Right Pattern
description: A quick win: understand Choosing the Right Pattern.

hook.text: There is no universal best pattern. The right model depends on your access patterns, scale, and consistency needs.

buildup.text: Ask: what are the most common queries? How often does data change? How strict is consistency?

discovery.text: High-read, low-write: denormalize and cache. High-write: normalize and append. Mixed: CQRS.

twist.text: Patterns combine. Use adjacency lists with soft deletes, EAV with JSONB, or event sourcing with materialized views.

climax.text: Start simple. Add patterns when bottlenecks appear. Premature optimization adds complexity without solving real issues.

punchline.text: Let your queries guide the model. Start simple, evolve as needed.

quiz.question: When should you apply advanced data modeling patterns?
options: When profiling reveals actual bottlenecks, not as premature optimization
Always from the very beginning of a project
